---
name: Adaptation
about: How the methodology works (or doesn't) in a non-Scrum context
labels: adaptation
---

**What context are you adapting to?**
e.g. Kanban, Shape Up, solo project, large org, non-software team.

**What works as-is?**
Which parts of the methodology transferred cleanly?

**What doesn't work?**
Which parts broke down, and why?

**What did you do instead?**
If you adapted the methodology, describe how. Concrete examples preferred over abstractions.
